name: Newsletter Signup Form
description: Collect the email addresses of your website visitors and add them to your newsletter.

3.label: Internal Information
3.description: This form collects names and email addresses to build your newsletter list. Just two fields keeps it simple and increases completion rates. Quick setup: [] Connect to your email platform in Marketing » Integrations (Mailchimp, AWeber, Constant Contact, and others) [] Add a GDPR checkbox if you have European subscribers [] Change the submit button text to match what you're offering ("Get Weekly Tips" works better than "Submit") [] Set up a confirmation email so people know they're subscribed Pro Tip: Connect this form to your email platform using WPForms Pro marketing integrations for automatic list building and audience segmentation.
3.expanded-description: Ways to get more signups: - Offer a lead magnet: Give people a free ebook, checklist, or exclusive content so they have a reason to subscribe right now. - Add clear value text: Include a short description above the form explaining what subscribers receive. - Place it strategically: Add the form to your sidebar, footer, or end of blog posts. You can also use pop-ups with exit-intent triggers. New to email signup forms? Read our guide for some Newsletter Signup Tips!

1.subject: New Entry: Newsletter Signup Form Template

1.name: Default Confirmation
1.message: Thanks for signing up for the newsletter! We'll be in touch soon.

Tips

  • Tips can be anything you like.

settings.save_resume_disclaimer_message: Heads up! Saving your progress now will store a copy of your entry on this server and the site owner may have access to it. For security reasons, sensitive information such as credit cards and mailing addresses, along with file uploads will have to be re-entered when you resume.
settings.save_resume_confirmation_message:
Your form entry has been saved and a unique link has been created which you can access to resume this form.

Enter your email address to receive the link via email. Alternatively, you can copy and save the link below.

Please note, this link should not be shared and will expire in 30 days, afterwards your form entry will be deleted.
